methods.name: NDT
methods.note: Uses velocity-model prediction as scan-to-map initial guess (no GT seed).

methods.name: CT-ICP
methods.note: Anchor matches first GT pose; subsequent frames use velocity-model bootstrap with LiTAMIN2-style acceptance gate (trans<=2m, rot<=0.25rad). 0 rollbacks to seed.

methods.name: CT-ICP+NDT
methods.note: Hybrid: CT-ICP no-GT odometry prior feeds NDT scan-to-map initial guess; first frame remains anchored to GT for dogfooding alignment. CT-ICP prior ATE=8.381m. Runtime is CT-ICP+NDT combined.
